name: standards-refresh.sh keeps the classifier-derived prose flag for pdf-section sources instead of forcing prose semantics on document rules
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r27-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && printf 'V14.1 Data Protection\nEncrypt data at rest.\n' > $OUT/s.txt && cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <<YAML
sources:
- id: r27-src
  name: R27
  jurisdiction: european-union
  url: file://$OUT/s.txt
  authoritative_publisher: Test Pub
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fetcher: pdf-section.sh
YAML
cd $OUT && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/reg.yaml --force --now 2026-07-11T00:00:00Z --out-dir $OUT/out 2>e.err; T=$OUT/out/european-union/r27-src.yaml; [ -f $T ] && grep -q 'shape=pdf-sections' e.err && grep -q 'applies_to_prose: false' $T && echo pdf-source-keeps-classifier-flag 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
